name: Take Me To Your Ledger
tagline: No leaders. Only the ledger. Beam up cows and the cult.
description: Pilot a Roswell saucer over a moonlit valley. Abduct cows, carry 600B cult leaders to the sacred stone, dodge fiat drones and shotgun normies, and carve five tiers of crop formation ending in a standing Bitcoin mark. Beam up mothership supply drops for magnet, shield, overclock, double-points and time-warp power-ups, draft perks every wave, and bring down THE TAXMAN. Plays on keyboard, touch or gamepad.
